name: aptavach
description: Aptavach — a local-first, source-grounded RAG assistant.

scripts.up: bunx concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "cd api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload" "cd web && bun dev"
scripts.up:all: bunx concurrently -k -n ollama,api,web -c yellow,blue,magenta "ollama serve" "cd api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload" "cd web && bun dev"
